summary: The diff implements all three requirements: REQ-1 (per-grade subject averages across all terms), REQ-2 (overall cross-grade subject averages), and REQ-3 (Computer Science max marks fix for Grades 1–7 = 20, Grade 8 = 30). The SubjectAnalysisView.tsx imports and uses calculatePerGradeSubjectAverages and calculateOverallSubjectAverages, and subjectAnalysis.ts exports SubjectAverageResult and PerGradeSubjectAverages interfaces with the relevant calculation functions. The getSubjectMaxMarks helper in subjectAnalysis.ts delegates to getExpectedMaxMarksForSubjectKey from maxMarks.ts. However, the diff for maxMarks.ts itself is not shown, so we cannot confirm the actual 20/30 values are set there.

missing_requirements.requirement: In frontend/src/lib/maxMarks.ts (or equivalent), Computer Science max marks is set to 20 for Grades 1–7 and 30 for Grade 8.
missing_requirements.reason: The file frontend/src/lib/maxMarks.ts is not present in the diff (not listed as modified or added). While subjectAnalysis.ts calls getExpectedMaxMarksForSubjectKey from maxMarks.ts, there is no evidence in the diff that the actual values (20 for Grades 1–7, 30 for Grade 8) were written into that file.
